keyEvents.text: Goal!  Suriname 1, Haiti 0. Ridgeciano Haps (Suriname) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner.
Goal!  Suriname 1, Haiti 1. Mikaël Cantave (Haiti) left footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Duckens Nazon.
Substitution, Haiti. Steven Séance replaces Carlens Arcus.
Substitution, Suriname. Kenneth Paal replaces Ridgeciano Haps.
Substitution, Suriname. Florian Jozefzoon replaces Kelvin Leerdam.
Substitution, Suriname. Dhoraso Klas replaces Leandro Kappel.
Substitution, Haiti. Stéphane Lambese replaces Mikaël Cantave.
Djevencio van der Kust (Suriname) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Substitution, Haiti. Jeppe Simonsen replaces Alex Christian.
Bryan Alcéus (Haiti) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
